final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu cover post for a "suren" (authentic amateur) creator, featuring DJI Pocket 4 first impressions, designed for the 9-grid cover format.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu 9-grid cover post, authentic amateur creator aesthetic, unpolished smartphone-photo feel
Composition: 9-grid layout (3x3), central hero panel with product, surrounding panels showing lifestyle context shots
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld gimbal camera, held by hands in casual lifestyle settings, product shots mixed with behind-the-scenes moments
Scene/backdrop: everyday life scenes — desk setup, outdoor walk, cafe table, bedroom floor — shot in natural unposed moments
Lighting/mood: natural daylight or indoor ambient, soft and approachable, not overly staged
Color palette: warm and friendly, slightly desaturated for that "suren" authentic feel
Materials/textures: real skin textures, fabric, wood surfaces, matte plastic of the device
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: 9-grid format visible, font must be cute and differentiated from standard templates, amateur-not-influencer vibe
Avoid: polished influencer aesthetic, stock-photo perfection, generic Xiaohongshu template fonts, over-retouched skin
